sections.summary: Table of contents listing Part A (methods of analysis by commodity categories and names), Part B (methods of sampling by commodity), and the commodity groupings; a non-substantive contents heading.

sections.section: PART A - METHODS OF ANALYSIS BY COMMODITY CATEGORIES AND NAMES
sections.summary: Part A header indicating a tabulated catalogue of analytical methods organized by commodity category and provision, mapping commodities to specific methods, analytical principles and method type classifications.

sections.section: Cereals, pulses and legumes and derived products
sections.summary: Tabulated methods for cereals, pulses, legumes and derived products specifying, by commodity, the analytical provisions and referenced methods (ISO, AOAC, ICC, EN, etc.) and their principles (e.g., gravimetry, titrimetry, HPLC) and method type classifications.
